title: Joytale Raised Dog Bowl Metal Stand, 9 Height-Adjustable（22cm-45cm), Heavy Duty Elevated Feeder with 2 Stainless Steel Bowls, Non-Slip and No Spill Feeding Station for Medium Large Dogs
features: Heavy-Duty Metal Stand:This elevated dog bowl stand crafted with reinforced alloy steel, strong and durable. Heavy-Duty metal stays firmly planted even for the large and energetic large breeds mealtime like Labradors or German Shepherds

Dual Stainless Steel Bowls: Includes 2 rust-proof stainless steel bowls (6-cup food + 1.5L water capacity) with 0.8mm thickened walls. Dishwasher-safe, detachable design ensures effortless cleaning and long-lasting hygiene

Anti-Slip Safety & Floor Protection: Non-slip pads and raised edges prevent bowls from sliding or spilling. Separate compartments keep food and water organised while guarding hardwood/tile floors against scratches and stains

9-Level Height Adjustment:This raised dog bowls offer tool-free fold legs (bowl tray: 7cm; adjustable height：22cm-45cm) grow with your dog from puppy to senior. Proper elevation reduces neck strain, much safe and healthy dog bowls for medium large dogs such as golden retrieve

Tilt Design and Foldable:This tilt angle designed for the position of the elevated food bowl helping improve swallowing comfort. In addition, the collapsible legs make it easy to pack and much space-saving, which is convenient in house

Elevated bowls reduce neck strain, aid digestion (30% less bloat risk), prevent mess, and suit all life stages—healthier than floor-level feeding for most dogs How to adjust the perfect height for my dog's elevated bowl? Measure from floor to elbow. Puppies: slightly lower; seniors: slightly higher. Ensure 15-20° head tilt when eating. Adjust as your dog grows. What are the advantages of metal stands vs plastic ones? Metal stands offer superior strength (supports large/energetic dogs), durability (chew-proof & rust-resistant), and stability (weighted anti-slip base + triangular bracing prevents spills completely). Is this dog bowl rack complicated to install? The assembly of this elevated dog bowl to be easy and straightforward, just took only 2-3 minutes to complete. And it requires absolutely no tools or extra parts to buy! How to clean and maintain? The stainless steel bowls are dishwasher-safe or can be hand-washed. Simply wipe other parts with a damp cloth.
